api_key.description: PersistIQ API key, sent as the X-API-KEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: PersistIQ API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the 'leads' stream's incremental sync, forwarded as updated_after (a real, live-documented PersistIQ query parameter); has no effect on any other stream, which are all full-refresh only.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
